title: Strasbourg Square Cardigan
description:
Inspired by the polished, subtle layers favored in European coffee houses and city squares, this cardigan is a timeless piece rendered in a soft mocha knit. This classic feminine sweater features a neat crew neckline, simple button-front closure, and a flattering cropped length designed to sit perfectly above the waistline of your favorite vintage-inspired dresses and high-rise skirts.

  • 60% Polyester 30% Nylon 10% Wool
  • Imported

Fit Notes & Measurements

  • Size 4 dress form (34C/26W) is wearing a small as shown
  • S: 19.5" length / 17.5" (armpit to armpit) / 28.25" (sleeves to neckline)
  • M: 20" length / 18" (armpit to armpit) / 28.5" (sleeves to neckline)
  • L: 20.5" length / 18.5" (armpit to armpit) / 28.75" (sleeves to neckline)

title: Preserved in Provence Dress
description:
Romantic interludes await you in this beautiful vintage inspired dress in a lovely muted lavender grey. This feminine vintage inspired lace trimmed midi dress features a sleeveless bodice with functional buttons down the front, pull through drawstring waist, and tiered skirt with delicate gathers to give the illusion of fullness without adding weight. 

  • 50% Viscose, 50% Rayon
  • Imported

Fit Notes & Measurements

  • Size 4 dress form (34C/26W) is wearing a small as shown
  • S: 41.5" length (not inc. adjustable straps) / 16" chest / 16" waist
  • M: 42.5" length (not inc. adjustable straps) / 17" chest / 17" waist
  • L: 43.5" length (not inc. adjustable straps) / 18" chest / 18" waist
